mapper.select: SELECT repayment_id, plan_id, term, principal, interest, repayment_amount, due_date, repayment_status, repayment_time FROM monthly_repayment WHERE repayment_id = #{repaymentId}

SELECT mr.repayment_id, mr.plan_id, mr.term, -- 期数 mr.principal, -- 当期本金 mr.interest, -- 当期利息 mr.repayment_amount, -- 当期总还款额 mr.due_date, -- 到期还款日 mr.repayment_status, -- 还款状态 mr.repayment_time, -- 实际还款时间 rp.application_id, -- 关联的贷款申请ID rp.user_id -- 关联的用户ID（可选） FROM monthly_repayment mr -- 关联还款计划主表，获取更多上下文信息（如申请ID、用户ID） LEFT JOIN repayment_plan rp ON mr.plan_id = rp.plan_id -- 筛选条件：指定还款计划ID WHERE mr.plan_id = #{planId} -- 按期数升序排列（从第1期到最后一期） ORDER BY mr.term ASC
SELECT repayment_id, plan_id, term, principal, interest, repayment_amount, due_date, repayment_status, repayment_time FROM monthly_repayment WHERE repayment_status = #{status}

SELECT DISTINCT mr.repayment_id, mr.plan_id, mr.term, mr.principal, mr.interest, mr.repayment_amount, mr.due_date, mr.repayment_status, mr.repayment_time FROM monthly_repayment mr INNER JOIN repayment_plan rp ON mr.plan_id = rp.plan_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.repayment_status = 'overdue'
SELECT mr.term AS term, COUNT(1) AS count FROM monthly_repayment mr WHERE mr.repayment_status = 'overdue' GROUP BY mr.term ORDER BY mr.term ASC
